title: Profitable Pressure Washing Business: Turnkey
description:
This is an established and profitable pressure washing business that provides commercial and residential pressure washing services throughout the Dallas–Fort Worth Metroplex. To complement these services, it also installs Christmas lights for high-end residential clients during the fourth quarter of the year that generates 30% of its revenue.

Operations are streamlined with equipment, systems, and processes in place, allowing for a smooth transition to a new owner. In addition, there are no certifications or licenses required to operate this business making it a turnkey opportunity. The business operates with manageable overhead and can be run as an owner-operator or expanded with additional crews to increase capacity and revenue.

This year, the company will have its first full year operating with two Google Business profiles and two Local Service Ad profiles, which is expected to roughly double lead flow. This increased demand will bring a growth opportunity of expanded staff, which in turn, will bring in higher gross and net profit.

Inquire for more details and learn how you can buy a business for as little as 10% down on qualified SBA listings or how to use creative financing options to get a deal done!
